# Dr. Mu'men Diraneyya Medical Clinic

> General and Laparoscopic Surgery Clinic in Amman, Jordan. Dr. Mu'men Diraneyya (Abu Obayda Al-Jarrah) is a Fellow of the Royal College of Surgeons of Edinburgh with 30 years of surgical experience and 5,000+ procedures performed. Consultations available in Arabic and English.

**Updated:** 2026-05-10
**Type:** Medical / Healthcare — Single-physician clinic
**Specialty:** General Surgery, Laparoscopic Surgery, Colorectal Surgery
**Language:** Arabic (primary), English (also spoken by the doctor)
**Audience:** Primarily Arabic-speaking patients in Jordan and the region; English-speaking patients also welcome — the doctor consults in English
**Location:** Amman, Jordan
**Pricing:** Consultation 25 JOD
**Canonical URL:** https://abuobaydatajjarrah.com

## About

Dr. Mu'men Ma'moun Diraneyya (Arabic: د. مؤمن مأمون ديرانية), known as Abu Obayda Al-Jarrah (أبو عبيدة الجرّاح), is a board-certified general surgeon based in Amman, Jordan. He is a Fellow of the Royal College of Surgeons of Edinburgh (FRCS) with 30 years of surgical experience.

## Credentials

- Fellow of the Royal College of Surgeons of Edinburgh (FRCS)
- 30 years of experience in general surgery
- 25 years in Ministry of Health and Saudi military hospitals
- Part-time lecturer at Al-Balqa Applied University Medical School
- 14 years in humanitarian medical relief work

## Services

The clinic specializes in:

- Laparoscopic surgery (minimally invasive)
- Hernia repair (inguinal, umbilical, incisional)
- Gallbladder removal (cholecystectomy)
- Hemorrhoid treatment (HAL, Ligasure, laser, PPH stapler)
- Anal fissure surgery
- Anal fistula surgery (including LIFT procedure and FiLaC laser)
- Pilonidal sinus surgery (including SiLaC laser)
- Thyroid surgery
- Breast surgery
- Appendectomy
- Colon and rectal surgery
- Diabetic foot surgery
- Circumcision

## Articles

Each article below is available at both an HTML URL and a clean-markdown URL (the `.md` variant) for AI assistants and crawlers.

### Anal canal (القناة الشرجية)
- [البواسير الشرجية — Hemorrhoids](/البواسير-الشرجية.md): Hemorrhoids, causes, grading, and modern treatment options.
- [الناسور الشرجي — Anal fistula](/الناسور-الشرجي.md): Anal fistula, causes, and surgical approaches.
- [الشرخ الشرجي — Anal fissure](/الشرخ-الشرجي.md): Anal fissure, causes, conservative care, and surgery.
- [الآفات الشرجية — Anal pathologies overview](/الآفات-الشرجية.md): Overview of anal lesions and how each is treated.
- [استئصال البواسير بالدباسة الشرجية — Stapled hemorrhoidectomy (PPH)](/استئصال-البواسير-بالدباسة-الشرجية.md): Hemorrhoid removal using the surgical stapler.
- [عملية ربط قناة الناسور الشرجي LIFT](/عملية-ربط-قناة-الناسور-الشرجي-LIFT.md): LIFT — ligation of the intersphincteric fistula tract.

### Abdominal wall hernias (فتوق جدار البطن)
- [فتق جدار البطن — Abdominal wall hernia](/فتق-جدار-البطن.md): What an abdominal wall hernia is and how it's treated.
- [فتوق جدار البطن — Abdominal wall hernias (overview)](/فتوق-جدار-البطن.md): Hernia types, causes, and surgical treatment.
- [فتوق جدار البطن وأسبابها وطرق علاجها](/فتوق-جدار-البطن-وأسبابها-وطرق-علاجها.md): Causes and surgical approaches for abdominal hernias.

### General surgery (جراحة عامة)
- [التشخيص والعلاج المبكران — Early diagnosis and treatment](/التشخيص-والعلاج-المبكران.md): Why early diagnosis matters in general surgery.
- [المضادات الحيوية واستئصال الزائدة الدودية — Antibiotics and appendectomy](/المضادات-الحيوية-واستئصال-الزائدة-الدودية.md): When antibiotics suffice vs. when surgery is needed.
- [الرضوح والأذيات — Trauma and injuries](/الرضوح-والأذيات.md): Trauma and injuries in general surgery.
- [عدوى الأنسجة الرخوة — Soft tissue infections](/عدوى-الأنسجة-الرخوة.md): Soft tissue infections and surgical management.
- [حديث في الجراحة وآفاق الجراحة العامة](/حديث-في-الجراحة-وآفاق-الجراحة-العامة.md): On general surgery as a specialty — scope, early diagnosis, surgical experience.

### Introductions and interviews (مقاطع تعريفية ومقابلات عامة)
- [تعريف بالطبيب — About the doctor](/تعريف-بالطبيب.md): Introductory video with Dr. Mu'men Diraneyya.
- [لقاء على قناة آرام — Aram TV interview](/لقاء-على-قناة-آرام.md): Interview on Aram TV.
- [لقاء على قناة الأردن الفضائية — Jordan TV interview](/لقاء-على-قناة-الأردن-الفضائية.md): Interview on Jordan TV.

## Location

Al-Noor Specialist Clinics Complex, 2nd Floor
13 Abdullah bin Jubair Street
Amman 11191, Jordan
(Next to Ibn Al-Haytham Hospital Emergency)

## Contact

- **Clinic reception:** +962 79 887 2899 (voice)
- **Doctor direct line:** +962 79 913 3299 (voice / WhatsApp)
- **WhatsApp inquiries (automated):** +962 78 276 0965 — automated bot that answers common questions instantly, routes clinical questions to the doctor, and routes administrative questions to Iman (the clinic secretary).
- **Website:** https://abuobaydatajjarrah.com

## Hours

- Saturday to Wednesday: 10:00 AM - 4:00 PM
- Thursday: 10:00 AM - 2:00 PM
- Friday: Closed
- Ramadan hours: Saturday to Thursday 1:00 PM - 4:00 PM

## Consultation Fee

25 Jordanian Dinars (JOD)
